## Problem
What player or developer problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature.

## Scope
- Affected area (gameplay, puzzle UX, progression, testing, docs):
- Priority (nice to have, soon, urgent):

## Acceptance idea
How would we know this is done?

## Alternatives considered
Any simpler options?
